content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — Description claims "ad blocker", "AI-powered suggestions", and "fully offline" support, but ContentView.swift only implements a plain in-memory task list (App/ContentView.swift:1-19) with no networking, ML/CoreML, or WebKit content-blocking code found in the project.
Pierre: Apple's App Review will actually test the described features, and unsubstantiated claims like "AI-powered" or "ad blocker" trigger 2.3/2.3.1 rejections when reviewers can't find them in the app. The Swift source shows only a basic SwiftUI task list with local `@State` array — no AI model, no offline persistence, no ad-blocking logic. Either implement these features or rewrite the description to match what TaskTide actually does.
